query:
SELECT 
  id,
  trainingSetId,
  userId,
  deviceId,
  totalPuzzles,
  correctCount,
  accuracy,
  completedAt
FROM cycle_history
WHERE trainingSetId = 'e0tvtNsNJqgaV6x1-jpTV'
ORDER BY completedAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute 
SELECT 
  id,
  trainingSetId,
  userId,
  deviceId,
  totalPuzzles,
  correctCount,
  accuracy,
  completedAt

ORDER BY completedAt DESC;
